title: SQL: avg(1) crashes server
key_bug_features: avg function with constant value causes server crash
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_avg (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_avg (id, value) VALUES (1, 1.0), (2, NULL), (3, 2.5);
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_avg WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(1) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_avg) AS subquery;
